title: Sample Data
subtitle: Load fabricated customers, projects, and time entries into the selected team so you can exercise the app with realistic density. Sample rows are tagged and can be removed at any time without touching real data.
noTeam: Pick a team above to manage its sample data.
onlyTeam: Only team you can target with this tool

load.title: Load sample data
load.description: Insert ~12 weeks of customers, projects, and time entries into this team. Each row is tagged as sample so it can be removed later.

replay.title: Replay sample data
replay.description: This org already has sample data. Running again deletes the existing sample rows and re-inserts a fresh spread — useful after testing destructive actions on sample rows.

remove.title: Remove sample data
remove.description: Delete every sample-tagged row in this org. Real customers, projects, and entries are untouched.
remove.nothing: No sample data in this org.

clear.title: Clear ALL data in this team
clear.description: Destructive. Deletes every customer, project, and time entry in this org — sample and real alike. Invoices and team settings are left alone.
